title: eutaxia neurocalyx subsp. neurocalyx
intro: Eutaxia neurocalyx subsp. neurocalyx is a shrub native to Australia, characterized by its small, green leaves and clusters of yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and expectorant, which helps in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. It is also valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, providing relief from conditions like eczema and wounds. In traditional herbal preparations, Eutaxia neurocalyx subsp. neurocalyx is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits, including the relief of respiratory issues, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function.
